body.docName: 消费平台开通申请事件
body.docCntHtml:
基本信息

事件名称: 消费平台开通申请事件

事件编号: ITRIPBIND

事件描述

企业开通消费平台申请事件，消费平台接订阅该事件，用于校验开通信息的正确性，并回调消费平台开通结果回调接口告知费控开通结果

触发情况

企业在费控点击开通消费平台，并输入开通信息点击保存后，将向对应消费平台发送该事件

事件报文说明

[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"bindParams","label":"%E7%BB%91%E5%AE%9A%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"code","label":"%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"key","desc":"%20%E6%B6%88%E8%B4%B9%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E6%8F%90%E4%BE%9B%E7%9A%84%E5%BC%80%E9%80%9A%E7%BB%91%E5%AE%9A%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%90%8D"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"value","label":"%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0%E5%80%BC","exampleValue":"keybx8ctxc9isbp6idefrjppaedhpwb3","desc":"%20%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E7%9A%84%E6%B6%88%E8%B4%B9%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E5%BC%80%E9%80%9A%E5%8F%82%E6%95%B0%E5%80%BC"}}]}]}]
